description_long: This object is a classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock and a long, slender metal barrel. The stock is robust and smoothly contoured, made from dark-stained wood, and extends to a slightly curved butt. The receiver and barrel are constructed from dark metal, with a bolt handle protruding from the right side, indicating manual cycling of the action. The rifle features iron sights, with a front post and a rear notch, both mounted directly on the barrel. The trigger guard and magazine area are integrated into the lower receiver, with the magazine appearing to be internal. The overall design is utilitarian and traditional, suitable for hunting or military use in an urban environment.
description: A traditional bolt-action rifle with a dark wooden stock, long metal barrel, and iron sights, featuring a classic and robust design.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the narrow barrel profile and the front sight post.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full length of the wooden stock, the bolt handle, trigger guard, and the iron sights along the barrel.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the butt of the stock and the slim profile of the barrel, with the bolt handle visible on the right.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the bolt handle, trigger guard, and the full length of the rifle, including the iron sights.
